title: Public Interest Tech, With Bruce Schneier
summary: Public Interest Technologist Bruce Schneier joins Techdirt on its podcast series to discuss how technologists can dedicate themselves to the common good.
body: Techdirt Podcast Episode 217 Overview Public Interest Technologist Bruce Schneier joins Techdirt on its podcast series to discuss how technologists can dedicate themselves to the common good.
